oneLiner: A fun, premium, protein-powered drink for people who want something exciting and social — without the alcohol — wherever nights out, dinners, and festivals happen.
positioningStatement: PEP is the better social drink: a vibrant and premium alternative to alcohol and tired sodas, giving everyone a fresh, feel-good ritual for nights out, bars, dinners, festivals, or rooftop events — with a light, fruity taste and zero pressure.
audience: People moderating or skipping alcohol at social events
People who want to hold a truly great drink out, without feeling boring or left out

voice.tone: Upbeat, social, premium, vibrant, never preachy or bro-y. Always feels like the invitation to the night, not gym instructor.

visual.mood: Fruity, festival, premium but playful. Feels just as at home in a rooftop bar as a high-energy summer party.
visual.photography: People in lively, social settings: cheers, groups raising glasses, sunsets, neon nights. Product shots in bar glassware, bright lighting, fizzy/fresh. Always group-focused, never solo gym selfies.
visual.typography: Logo: Didot (bold, serif for flair); headline/slogan: Brittany Signature (script, playful); badges/labels: Montserrat (crisp); stat callouts: Montserrat (extra bold). Use Bebas Neue for NEW/limited highlights.
visual.designConcept: Fun, premium packaging, vibrant, festival vibe, fruity
rejectLooks: Retro 90s gym or hyper-masculine sports looks

inLineBrands.name: Kin Euphorics
inLineBrands.why: Trendy and experiential, built for social/festival moments with a mood-elevating twist.

inLineBrands.name: Lyre's
inLineBrands.why: Elevates the social drink ritual without alcohol; sophisticated, aesthetic and party-occasion ready.

inLineBrands.name: Seedlip
inLineBrands.why: Premium and non-alcoholic, designed for bar/restaurant settings. Fulfills the need for an exciting, elevated social drink.

peerBrandsOtherPositionings.name: HOLY
peerBrandsOtherPositionings.whyNotActive: Purely functional/vitamin-driven, lacks social/ritual angle or premium, festive vibe.

peerBrandsOtherPositionings.name: LMNT
peerBrandsOtherPositionings.whyNotActive: Essentially a sports/electrolyte solution with clinical branding; no social or experience-driven appeal.

peerBrandsOtherPositionings.name: NOCCO
peerBrandsOtherPositionings.whyNotActive: Focused on gym/energy/recovery rather than social moments or lifestyle fun.

peerBrandsOtherPositionings.name: PROTOCHOL
peerBrandsOtherPositionings.whyNotActive: Mixes protein and alcohol — different territory (novelty hybrid) and likely niche for fitness bars, not the inclusive/night-out ritual.

peerBrandsOtherPositionings.name: VITAMIN WELL
peerBrandsOtherPositionings.whyNotActive: Everyday hydration positioning; lacks emotional, experiential, or elevated social experience.

peerBrandsOtherPositionings.name: BLOOM
peerBrandsOtherPositionings.whyNotActive: Wellness/prebiotic lifestyle lane (fun, but less about night-out/social ritual and more health-identity).

peerBrandsOtherPositionings.name: EVER TREE
peerBrandsOtherPositionings.whyNotActive: Elegant, soft drink/aperitif for wellness occasions — less vibrant/festival, more daytime and delicacy than party.

peerBrandsOtherPositionings.name: OLIPOP
peerBrandsOtherPositionings.whyNotActive: Approachable, health-focused, daily ‘better soda’ — less resonance with bar/party/experience settings.

peerBrandsOtherPositionings.name: Poppi
peerBrandsOtherPositionings.whyNotActive: Prebiotic/refreshing, but squarely in the healthy, everyday refreshment space, not the premium social ritual.

peerBrandsOtherPositionings.name: Alive & Well
peerBrandsOtherPositionings.whyNotActive: Kombucha brand with artisanal/wellness focus and smoother taste, not designed for high-energy social settings.

peerBrandsOtherPositionings.name: Recess
peerBrandsOtherPositionings.whyNotActive: Built for relaxation and winding down, not for the high-energy, premium social experience.

peerBrandsOtherPositionings.name: Ole cocktails
peerBrandsOtherPositionings.whyNotActive: Relevant for RTD cocktails/mocktails, but not about non-alcoholic, protein-driven, premium social moments.

peerBrandsOtherPositionings.name: Ish
peerBrandsOtherPositionings.whyNotActive: Modern, inclusive, minimal and alcohol-free but centered in lifestyle/Scandinavian ‘cool’ vs. vibrant, party-driven.

antiReferences.name: Lean Body / Gym RTD
antiReferences.why: Gym-bro protein flavors, clinical packaging, functional-first; works against social ritual.

antiReferences.name: drinkpep.com
antiReferences.why: Name collision; US energy/probiotic drink, completely different market, design, and experience.

antiReferences.name: NOCCO / LMNT
antiReferences.why: Represents functional, gym, or energy focus over social pleasure.

antiReferences.name: Kids fruit juice
antiReferences.why: Too childish, no premium/social cues; avoids PEP's stylish, adult vibe.

brandFitRules: Only select brands that build their entire experience around night-out, bar, party, or festival occasions — not everyday wellness or gym.
Reject any visual language that’s clinical, gym-oriented, or overly ‘wellness minimal’ (muted pastels, greenwashed, soft-focus).
Favor bold colors, playful typography, and group/celebration imagery over solo/functional scenes.
Copy/voice must avoid gym/performance or supplement language — never talk about protein ‘targets’, macros, or performance benefits.
Product and website must instantly feel fun, premium, and worthy of being seen/photographed in a bar or rooftop context.
